blockers.title: Seen-at schema mismatch in some environments
Production submit upload fails for ~1MB photos (usability blocker)
Pin selection reorders cards instead of selecting in place
Browse filter visual hierarchy is noisy (extra Found-at container)
Filter interaction pattern not locked to pill + clear-link behavior
Upvote design/process not fully activated and verified in production flow
Marketing page alignment to current canon not fully verified
Marketing tests/smoke coverage not tracked as release evidence
Mobile browse poster lands with browse section expanded, pushing workspace below first viewport
Filter taxonomy/content model not yet specified for scalable discovery UX
Community preference + disagreement handling model not yet defined (filter-level signal path)
Potential perceived partisan suppression risk (Republican/Democrat visibility concerns)
Known vs unknown venue state is not explicitly modeled across browse/poster/builder surfaces
Place taxonomy and IA are inconsistent across venue/seen-at/found-at/business-place concepts
MVP scope conflict on upvote in poster-details cards (remove for now vs activate flow)

next_actions.title: Schema parity DEV/PROD for seen_at_name (blocked: run migration)
Prod submit usability fix: 1MB photo upload failure
Vocabulary lock pass on core routes
Fix pin click card reorder + auto-scroll selected card
Activate upvote design/process and verify end-to-end
Browse filter visual cleanup (remove extra container)
Lock filter pill interaction pattern + clear link
Design pass for mobile browse landing state (collapsed browse default)
MVP poster-view panel/title polish + remove upvote in details cards
MVP mobile friendliness error scan (no redesign)

ship_lane.distraction_policy: Capture off-lane ideas to FFA/QB only; defer execution until ship lane clears
